scripts.dev: concurrently "next dev" "uv run --directory python-backend uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8100"
scripts.build:clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && next build
scripts.verify:deps: uv lock --check && uv run --locked python -m pip check && npm ci --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate
scripts.verify:python:full: uv run --locked python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v
scripts.verify:python:research: uv run --locked python -m unittest tests.test_options_api_e2e tests.test_market_data_service tests.test_metric_truth_audit tests.test_expectancy_calibration tests.test_wfo_optimizer_calibration tests.test_autoresearch_cycle -v
scripts.verify:profitability-paper-gates: uv run --locked python scripts/build_regular_options_paper_shortlist.py --no-write --strict-gate --json && uv run --locked python -m unittest tests.test_regular_options_paper_shortlist tests.test_regular_options_fresh_evidence_loop tests.test_current_policy_circuit_breaker tests.test_regular_options_profit_capture_queue tests.test_regular_options_repair_attempt_readback tests.test_regular_options_repair_burndown tests.test_log_scan_picks tests.test_regular_options_multilane_portfolio -v && uv run --locked python scripts/build_regular_options_profit_capture_queue.py --no-write --json && uv run --locked python scripts/build_regular_options_repair_attempt_readback.py --no-write --json && uv run --locked python scripts/build_regular_options_repair_burndown.py --no-write --json && uv run --locked python scripts/build_regular_options_fresh_evidence_loop.py --no-write --json && uv run --locked python scripts/build_current_policy_circuit_breaker.py --no-write --json && uv run --locked python scripts/run_regular_options_multilane_portfolio.py --no-write --json && uv run --locked python scripts/replay_short_term_filter_point_in_time.py --no-write --json && uv run --locked python scripts/monitor_current_policy_entry_filter_paper.py --no-write --json
scripts.verify:accuracy:no-write: uv run --locked python scripts/run_with_timeout.py --timeout-seconds 900 -- python scripts/run_ai_commodity_opra_progress.py --skip-capture --skip-scan --no-write --json --strict-gate
scripts.verify:docs: uv run --locked python scripts/generate_route_parity.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_backend_route_ownership_map.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_storage_ownership_map.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_trading_desk_schema_bridge.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_proof_evidence_contract.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_proof_invariant_table.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_legacy_lane_boundaries.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_ai_commodity_isolation.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_remediation_loop_map.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_agent_memory_graph.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_generated_artifact_governance.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/generate_final_remediation_closure_pack.py --check && uv run --locked python scripts/check_living_docs_hygiene.py
scripts.verify:fast: npm run verify:python:research && npm run daytrading:test
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify:python:full && npm run daytrading:test && npm run polymarket:test && npm run verify:smoke && npm run build
scripts.verify:ci:local: npm run verify:deps && npm run verify:docs && npm run lint && npm run verify:typecheck && npm run verify:full
scripts.verify:e2e:local: npm run verify:ci:local && npm run verify:accuracy:no-write && npm run verify:profit-loop:dry
